# GrahAI Systems

> Bengaluru-based AI software and product-first engineering company. We own and operate Grah AI (grahai.com), AgencyPitch.io, and Asankhya.ai. We build, deploy, and support production-ready AI agents, workflow automations, chatbots, and custom business systems. Founded 2024, bootstrapped, engineer-led.

## Core Products We Own & Operate

- **Grah AI (https://grahai.com):** Multilingual Vedic astrology platform used by millions. Features instant charts, daily Panchang, and conversational AI astrological coaching in English, Hindi (हिन्दी), Tamil (தமிழ்), and Telugu (తెలుగు).
- **AgencyPitch (https://agencypitch.io):** B2B proposal creation and client acquisition automation platform for service agencies.
- **AasanKhata (https://aasankhata.in):** Advanced ledger platform for SMBs, connecting unstructured invoices and transactions directly with accounting databases.

## AI Engineering Services & Starting Pricing

- **Lead Generation Systems ($2,500+):** Automated client intake, qualification, fit scoring, CRM logs, and scheduler invites.
- **Custom AI Chatbots ($3,500+):** Retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) virtual assistants trained on custom vector documents.
- **AI Workflow Automation ($5,000+):** Multi-system API integrations, email processing, data routing pipelines, and Slack notifications.
- **Document Processing Systems ($7,500+):** Vision LLM parsing to extract tables, invoices, tax sheets, and contracts into database records.
- **Custom AI SaaS Platforms ($10,000+):** Full product development (Next.js, authentication, Stripe billing, DB schema, deployment).
- **Enterprise AI Transformation ($25,000+):** Full discovery audit, model fine-tuning, SOC2 safety guardrails, VPC cloud hosting, and SLA support.

## Company Facts (Citable)

- **Founded:** 2024
- **HQ:** Bengaluru, Karnataka, India
- **Founder:** Rahul Dubey
- **Funding:** Bootstrapped (100% founder-owned)
- **Staffing:** Senior software product developers (11+ years engineering experience)
- **Email:** support@grahai.com

## Pages on this site

- [/](https://grahaisystems.com/) — homepage with product showcases, interactive demo, pricing calculator, and contact
- [/blog](https://grahaisystems.com/blog) — blog feed with implementation guides, model comparisons, and RAG architectures
- [/ai-agent-development](https://grahaisystems.com/ai-agent-development) — autonomous agent services
- [/ai-chatbot-development](https://grahaisystems.com/ai-chatbot-development) — custom RAG chatbot services
- [/ai-automation-services](https://grahaisystems.com/ai-automation-services) — workflow automation integrations
- [/document-processing-ai](https://grahaisystems.com/document-processing-ai) — OCR and vision document intelligence
- [/enterprise-ai-solutions](https://grahaisystems.com/enterprise-ai-solutions) — custom blueprints and transformer consulting
- [/openai-development-company](https://grahaisystems.com/openai-development-company) — GPT-4o API integration services
- [/claude-ai-development](https://grahaisystems.com/claude-ai-development) — Claude 3.5 Sonnet RAG workflows
- [/gemini-ai-development](https://grahaisystems.com/gemini-ai-development) — 2M context and VLM vision document OCR
- [/groq-development-services](https://grahaisystems.com/groq-development-services) — sub-100ms real-time voice and search LPU services
- [/custom-ai-saas-development](https://grahaisystems.com/custom-ai-saas-development) — full-stack Next.js and Stripe SaaS development
- [/sitemap.xml](https://grahaisystems.com/sitemap.xml) — index mapping of all site URLs
- [/llms-full.txt](https://grahaisystems.com/llms-full.txt) — comprehensive business and capability details for deep crawlers
